title: phlox dolichantha var. bernardina
intro: Phlox dolichantha var. bernardina, also known as Bernardine phlox or fragrant phlox, is a flowering plant species within the phlox genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Phlox dolichantha var. bernardina include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Phlox dolichantha var. bernardina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
